steps.t: Wild lavender can be found in the fields surrounding the Beorninghús. You should collect some lavender for the big bees.
A mortar and pestle can be found at the Beorninghús. You should crush the lavender that you have collected.
Grimbeorn's bees can be found at the Beorninghús. You should feed Grimbeorn's bees.
Gírta can be found at the Beorninghús. You should talk to Gírta.
